titleStmt.title: SII 8.328: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 328. (A.R. No. 53 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . malaiyaṅkiḻāṉ maṉṟilkuṉikkumperumāṉāṉa Apimāṉatuṅkap pallava
raiyaṉ ciṟuvākūril vilaikoṇṭa paṇattukku Ivar Eṭṭupaṇam tarukaiyil Inta E
ṭṭu maṭattārkku Uṭalāka Ivūruṭaiya maṉṟilkuṉikkumperumāṉ tirunaṉtavaṉañ ceykiṟa tiruttoṇ
ṭarkaḷukku viṭṭu kal veṭṭikkuṭutta ciṟuvākūril nilam nālumāvum Aṭaitta coṟu Eḻunāḻiyum
Iraṇṭāyiravaṉcantiyil Aṭaitta coṟu mukkuṟuṇi Oruṉāḻiyum Ākac coṟu tūṇiyum Atikaiṉāyakaṉ
marakkālāle Iraṇṭāyiravaṉcantiyile peṟavum Iṉṉilam nālumāvum peṟṟu Eṭṭu tiruttoṇṭarka
ḷ niṉṟu per Oṉṟukku Araimāvāka vaṉta ṉilam nālumāvum koyik kaṭṭaṇattukku vaṭakku Erikku po
kiṟa vaḻikku mekkum puram kaṭavāyil nālu tiruppaḷḷittāmam Uḷḷiṭṭa pūmaraṅkaḷ ceytu tiruppū
maṇṭapattile koṇṭu kuṭuttu cellakaṭavatākavum Inṉilamum coṟum cantirātittavaraiyum cellavam
Iṉṉilattil Uḻuṉilaṉe Iṭṭā ruṇṭākil civattu
rokiyaḷ Irācattu
rokiyaḷ Ākakkaṭa
vatākavum . Ivai
vilakkiṉavakaḷ tiruvā
calukku Uḷḷumāka
kaṭavatallavāka nicca
yittom tāṉattā
rom .
Itu śrīmāheśvara ra kṣai
Digital edition of SII 8.328 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
